description_long: This upright piano features a natural wood finish with intricate, organic patterns and decorative motifs resembling tree branches and roots. The front panel is adorned with sculpted, vine-like elements that wrap around the body and extend to the floor, integrating additional musical instruments such as a violin, banjo, and drum into the design. The keyboard is standard, with alternating white and black keys, and the top lid is closed, showing subtle golden leaf-like accents. The side panels are similarly decorated with carved branch patterns, and the back is plain, revealing the piano's structural panels. The overall appearance is whimsical and artistic, blending traditional craftsmanship with nature-inspired embellishments. This piano would serve as a striking centerpiece in an urban park, plaza, or creative public space.
description: A wooden upright piano with nature-inspired carvings, vine motifs, and attached musical instruments, blending art and function.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full keyboard, decorative vines, and attached instruments including a violin, banjo, and drum.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the piano, the violin, and the vine details wrapping around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain wooden back with structural panels and minimal decoration.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the drum and the continuation of the vine motifs, as well as the profile of the keyboard.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys in alternating pattern; no visible missing or non-standard keys.
